description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a black metal body accented by gold or brass highlights along the barrels and mechanical components. It has a triple-barrel configuration, with three parallel barrels stacked horizontally, each featuring vented or ribbed sections for heat dissipation. The grip is made of wood, ergonomically shaped, and attached to a compact frame with a visible hammer and trigger mechanism. The receiver and fore-end are reinforced with metallic elements, and the overall build suggests a heavy, durable construction. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger. The shotgun's design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A triple-barrel shotgun with a black metal body, gold accents, and a wooden grip, featuring a robust, tactical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three parallel barrels and the alignment of the muzzle openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, the wooden grip, and the detailed barrel assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back ends of the barrels and the hammer mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden grip, trigger guard, and the triple-barrel configuration.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Triple-barrel, horizontally parallel with vented/ribbed sections and uniform barrel lengths.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
